name: m1_compound_kv_secret
description: Risk #4 regression — a COMPOUND secret key (secret_key=, client_secret=) must be redacted. A bare \bsecret\b boundary missed `secret_key=` because `_` is a word char, leaking the value to persistence. Guards the broadened kv_secret alternation in redactors.

payload.note: configured secret_key=topSecretValue99 and client_secret=anotherHidden42 for the run
